Gentle Dr. Jekyll (Spencer Tracy) tests a serum on himself, releasing vicious alter-ego Mr. Hyde on 19th-century London. Prowling the town, Hyde ventures to a music hall and encounters Ivy (Ingrid Bergman), whom he takes forcibly as his mistress.
programme.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde

programme.desc: Doc Holliday (Kirk Douglas) joins Wyatt Earp (Burt Lancaster) and his brothers for a Tombstone showdown with the Clanton gang.
programme.title: Gunfight at the O.K. Corral

programme.desc: Oscar-winning adaptation of the Broadway hit about an English professor (Rex Harrison) who teaches a cockney merchant (Audrey Hepburn) to be a lady.
programme.title: My Fair Lady

programme.desc: S01 E18 — Lucy and Viv Put in a Shower Lucy decides that the time has come to install another shower.
programme.title: The Lucy Show

programme.desc: Lovers quarrel around surfers, Don Rickles, Buster Keaton, Von Zipper's biker gang.
programme.title: Beach Blanket Bingo

programme.desc: New York playgirl Holly Golightly puzzles a writer who lives in her building.
programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's

programme.desc: When scientists suspect that an alien force is attacking Earth, they send two spaceships to weaken the enemy.
programme.title: Battle in Outer Space

programme.desc: Masked Man (Clayton Moore) and Tonto (Jay Silverheels) learn why hooded riders have been killing Indians and stealing medallions.
programme.title: The Lone Ranger and the Lost City of Gold

programme.desc: The story of the heroic English nurse who was executed by a German firing squad for aiding refugees during World War I.
programme.title: Nurse Edith Cavell

programme.desc: Slapstick comedy from Larry, Moe, Curly and occasionally Shemp.
programme.title: The Three Stooges

programme.desc: S01 E12 — Hand on the Gun A tenderfoot with pretensions of being a quick-draw expert rides into Dave's camp.
programme.title: The Westerner

programme.desc: The Briefcase Story Steve must uncover who is trying to sabotage a meeting in Paris between representatives from the United States and three Eastern European countries.
programme.title: Dangerous Assignment

programme.desc: S02 E11 — Touch Off Mike investigates an arson ring.
programme.title: Man With a Camera

programme.desc: S01 E21 — The Spy International spies hide microfilm in Dagwood's hat, and now they want it back.
programme.title: Blondie

programme.desc: S01 E18 — Lucy and Viv Put in a Shower Lucy decides that the time has come to install another shower.
programme.title: The Lucy Show

programme.desc: S01 E32 — Death at Dawn A member of a powerful gang murders a shopkeeper; the deputized Cartwrights sentence a murderer to hang at dawn when the leader of the gang kidnaps Ben and holds him hostage.
programme.title: Bonanza

programme.desc: Lovers quarrel around surfers, Don Rickles, Buster Keaton, Von Zipper's biker gang.
programme.title: Beach Blanket Bingo

programme.desc: A California girl called Gidget (Sandra Dee) spends summer with surf bums called Moondoggie (James Darren) and Kahuna (Cliff Robertson).
programme.title: Gidget

programme.desc: Robbo (Frank Sinatra), Little John (Dean Martin), Will (Sammy Davis Jr.) and company are charitable gangsters fighting for turf in 1928 Chicago.
programme.title: Robin and the Seven Hoods

programme.desc: New York playgirl Holly Golightly puzzles a writer who lives in her building.
programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's

programme.desc: After returning to Hawaii from being in the army, a pineapple tycoon's rebellious son turns into an island tour guide with his girlfriend.
programme.title: Blue Hawaii

programme.desc: Rebel trucker "Rubber Duck" (Kris Kristofferson) blocks a crooked sheriff (Ernest Borgnine) with a CB-linked army of big rigs.
programme.title: Convoy

programme.desc: Horrible old movies hosted by Dr. Paul Bearer direct from his home, the Tenement Castle.
programme.title: Dr. Paul Bearer's Creature Feature

programme.desc: S01 E32 — Death at Dawn A member of a powerful gang murders a shopkeeper; the deputized Cartwrights sentence a murderer to hang at dawn when the leader of the gang kidnaps Ben and holds him hostage.
programme.title: Bonanza

programme.desc: A doctor (John Forsythe) sets an expiration date with a rich patient's (Richard Kiley) wife (Reta Shaw).
programme.title: Murder Once Removed

programme.desc: Horrible old movies hosted by Dr. Paul Bearer direct from his home, the Tenement Castle.
programme.title: Dr. Paul Bearer's Creature Feature

programme.desc: Corrupted by a lord (George Sanders), Oscar Wilde's London aristocrat (Hurd Hatfield) stays young, but his portrait begins to age.
programme.title: The Picture of Dorian Gray

programme.desc: Kipling's boy hero Mowgli (Sabu), lost in the jungle, is adopted by animals and taught how they talk.
programme.title: Jungle Book

programme.desc: S01 E01 — The Thin Rope Jim Hardie guards a stagecoach carrying gold.
programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.desc: The Tabernacle Choir at Temple Square performs songs of hope, faith and inspiration; singing sacred hymns both new and old from around the world as well as uplifting selections from the American songbook.
programme.title: Music & the Spoken Word

programme.desc: A dancing princess (Rita Hayworth) loves a Roman commander (Stewart Granger) and inspires King Herod (Charles Laughton) to have John the Baptist beheaded.
programme.title: Salome

programme.desc: A small-town Mississippi boss tries to pair his daughter (Joanne Woodward) with an enigmatic drifter (Paul Newman).
programme.title: The Long, Hot Summer
